@@ -0,0 +1,719 @@
+{
+  "name": "tab-manager",
+  "displayName": "Tab Manager",
+  "description": "Group, filter, and sort open tabs and workspace files from the activity bar and Explorer.",
+  "version": "0.1.4",
+  "publisher": "newdlops",
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "icon": "media/icon.png",
+  "preview": true,
+  "qna": false,
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "https://github.com/newdlops/tab-manager.git"
+  },
+  "bugs": {
+    "url": "https://github.com/newdlops/tab-manager/issues"
+  },
+  "homepage": "https://github.com/newdlops/tab-manager#readme",
+  "galleryBanner": {
+    "color": "#1E88E5",
+    "theme": "dark"
+  },
+  "engines": {
+    "vscode": "^1.85.0"
+  },
+  "categories": ["Other", "Visualization"],
+  "keywords": [
+    "tabs",
+    "tab manager",
+    "explorer",
+    "workspace",
+    "filter",
+    "modified",
+    "untracked",
+    "errors",
+    "group",
+    "sort",
+    "productivity"
+  ],
+  "activationEvents": ["onStartupFinished"],
+  "main": "./dist/extension.js",
+  "contributes": {
+    "viewsContainers": {
+      "activitybar": [
+        {
+          "id": "tabManager",
+          "title": "Tab Manager",
+          "icon": "media/tab-icon.svg"
+        }
+      ]
+    },
+    "views": {
+      "tabManager": [
+        {
+          "id": "tabManagerView",
+          "name": "Open Tabs"
+        }
+      ],
+      "explorer": [
+        {
+          "id": "tabManagerExplorer",
+          "name": "Workspace",
+          "visibility": "visible",
+          "order": 0
+        }
+      ]
+    },
+    "viewsWelcome": [
+      {
+        "view": "tabManagerView",
+        "contents": "No tabs are open."
+      },
+      {
+        "view": "tabManagerExplorer",
+        "contents": "No workspace folder is open.",
+        "when": "workbenchState == empty"
+      }
+    ],
+    "commands": [
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.createGroup",
+        "title": "New Group",
+        "icon": "$(new-folder)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.renameGroup",
+        "title": "Rename Group",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.deleteGroup",
+        "title": "Delete Group",
+        "icon": "$(trash)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.closeTab",
+        "title": "Close Tab",
+        "icon": "$(close)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.closeSelected",
+        "title": "Close Selected Tabs",
+        "icon": "$(close-all)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.addToGroup",
+        "title": "Add to Group...",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.removeFromGroup",
+        "title": "Remove from Group",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.sort.nameAsc",
+        "title": "Sort by Name (Ascending)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.sort.nameDesc",
+        "title": "Sort by Name (Descending)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.sort.nameNone",
+        "title": "No Name Sort",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.sort.toggleType",
+        "title": "Sort by Type",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.filter.modified",
+        "title": "Show Modified Only",
+        "icon": "$(diff-modified)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.filter.untracked",
+        "title": "Show Untracked Only",
+        "icon": "$(diff-added)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"

+      {

+        "title": "Show Deleted Only",
+        "icon": "$(diff-removed)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.filter.errors",
+        "title": "Show Errors Only",
+        "icon": "$(error)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.filter.clear",
+        "title": "Clear Filter",
+        "icon": "$(clear-all)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
+        "command": "tabManager.filter.tabsOnly",
+        "title": "Show Open Tabs Only",
+        "icon": "$(files)",
+        "category": "Tab Manager"
+      },
+      {
